name: Payments Integration Pipeline
description: ISO 20022 compliance verification, schema validation, and payments domain correctness.

phases.name: Schema Validation

delegates.task_template: Validate ISO 20022 schema compliance, canonicalization rules, and backward compatibility for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: All message schemas validated against ISO 20022 XSD

phases.name: Integration Testing

delegates.task_template: Write and run integration tests for payments message flows: ${goal}
Test for injection vulnerabilities in payment message parsing: ${goal}
Verify regulatory compliance (PCI-DSS, PSD2) for payments integration: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: Integration tests passing and compliance verified

delegates.task_template: Final quality gate for payments release: ${goal}
